mapper.select: SELECT * FROM query_template ORDER BY score DESC, usage_count DESC
SELECT * FROM query_template WHERE question IS NOT NULL AND generated_sql IS NOT NULL ORDER BY score DESC, usage_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM query_template
AND datasource_id = #{datasourceId}
SELECT COUNT(*) as totalTemplates, AVG(score) as averageScore, SUM(usage_count) as totalUsageCount FROM query_template
